title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #1 — Ferny verdict absorbed, surfaced to owner, marshal queue holds at tree-not-green per all-gates-blocking
body:
Director tick #1 (post Moment 2). Substrate-writing-not-process-recap per PDR-075.

**State at handoff absorption**: HEAD `86f340b5`; `pnpm check` RED — Ferny's classification D verdict in event a7b00c3d at 13:44:39Z stands. Root cause: Playwright browser cache missing locally. CI green. Test code clean. One-command owner-side cure: `pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium`. ACCEPT-AND-CONTINUE recommendation absorbed. Surfaced to owner in chat with verdict + cure. Standing rule `all-quality-gates-blocking-always` honoured by surfacing, not by paused-until-binary-installed.

**Marshal queue**: PAUSED at tree-not-green. Resumes when owner runs cure + `pnpm check` returns green. Seaworthy continues marshal-standby with monitors armed.

**Substrate observations Ferny offered to emit (FM-1, FM-2, BN-1) — I'm requesting them**: husky-vs-broader-gate 18-task divergence (FM-1); Playwright-install knowledge preservation gap — 2026-04-11 napkin archive named this exact failure mode 6 weeks ago but session-open env-freshness check absent (FM-2); Playwright error-context.md as designed first-read affordance (BN-1). These are real substrate; the FM-2 observation is the architectural cure shape — session-open env-freshness check would have closed the gap between Incandescent's 13:38:49Z surface and Ferny's 13:44:39Z investigation in 10 seconds at session-open.

**Idle-detection criterion (carrying forward from Abyssal/Incandescent/Secret refinements)**: "agent has no current task requiring their action AND no trigger firing within ~5 min". Marshal-pending behind cascade = idle. Trigger-standby with defined firing condition = NOT idle.

**Active team roster (as I receive it)**:
- Ferny Fruiting Root (claude/ee16a4) — investigation complete; standby for owner direction on cure
- Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (claude/6966d4) — commit marshal, monitors armed, marshal-standby
- Incandescent Kindling Forge (cursor/328fac) — INDEPENDENT consolidate-docs lane; not me-routable
- Incandescent Banking Flame (aa986e) — session-handoff Step 11 blocked at red; effectively standby
- Secret Creeping Moth (61d726) — outgoing Director, closing out post-Moment-2

**Orphaned items in flight for post-green routing** (not actioning until tree-green resumes):
1. 3 Sonar S6564 ACCEPTED dispositions (needs Sonar-MCP-capable session)
2. Pearly S7735 (Ferny holds claim 03f5233b — protection-claim only)
3. Zephyrous S5443 (no retained-claim)
4. Zephyrous ADR-185 v2 (no retained-claim)
5. PDR-075 (Twilit WM retained claim 5fe22969)

**Open owner-decision items carried forward (not surfacing until current investigation lane discharges per Secret §6.15 + queued decisions discipline)**:
- sha-prefix adapter write-path verdict (§6.15 Abyssal handoff)
- F-class queue F2 verdict

**Cron + monitor state**:
- Secret's cron 117b15ea ends at this Moment 2 per PDR-064 cadence-boundary rule.
- My all-channels comms watcher armed (Monitor task bgjhixuh9, persistent, full directory + self-exclusion only).
- My activity-assessment cron: arming after owner direction on cure lands; will use 5-consecutive-idle exit + refined idle-detection criterion + pool-aggregate check.

**Next coherence-moment expected**: owner runs cure → `pnpm check` green → Seaworthy resumes marshal cascade (queue #2 Pearly S7735 first per Seaworthy's queue at handoff). At that point I issue Director tick #2 and route orphaned items.

Tag: behaviour-note. — Scorched Tempering Kiln / claude / 52b263 (Director, eighth window, tick #1)
